ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial

Petition For Final Distribution Of Trust Estate And For Payment Of Fees And Costs To Petitioner'S Attorney
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Final Distribution Of Trust Estate And For Payment Of Fees And Costs To Petitioner'S Attorney
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Continued To Apr-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington, via ZOOM, for Julianne Wong, Petitioner; Cameren Ripoli, via ZOOM, for Christina Jang, via ZOOM, and Mary Ann Yuen, Objectors.

The court asks for an update regarding settlement discussions. Ms. Harrington reports that the parties are scheduled for mediation on Mar-14-2022. The court advises counsel that it will be issuing a Case Management Order and discusses possible Case Management Hearing and trial dates. The parties confirm that they are amenable to the court setting a date for Case Management Hearing in mid-April and for trial in mid-June of this year. The Court advises the parties that it will issue a Case Management order. A Case Management hearing is set for Apr-19-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The trial date is pending and will be included in the Case Management Order.

The Petition for Final Distribution, etc., is continued to Apr-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

Petition For Final Distribution Of Trust Estate And For Payment Of Fees And Costs To Petitioner'S Attorney
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Continued To Feb-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington, via ZOOM, for Julianne Wong, Petitioner; Cameren Ripoli, via ZOOM, for Mary Ann Yuen and Christina Jang, Respondents.

Ms. Harrington and Mr. Ripoli provide oral argument to advocate for their clients' positions. The court reminds the parties that a copy of the complete trust instrument must be provided to all of the parties. Mr. Ripoli reports that he is working on a six-year accounting to determine distributions and assets. Mr. Ripoli is advised that the court will not review a six-year accounting and points him to the local rules regarding the preceding.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Final Distribution is continued to Feb-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The parties are instructed to file a joint Case Management Statement by Feb-08-2022.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.
